meta.description: How US-GAAP presentation labels from acct_facts* tie into EDGAR companyfacts concept keys and the financial_model concept_groups.

merge_notes: Later files in merge_order override the same us_gaap_list concept. Run sync after editing any source file.

by_concept_record.label: Presentation title (acct_label).
by_concept_record.acct_category: Optional coarse bucket when sourced from acct_facts_updated.json (e.g. asset, liability, expense, owners equity, revenue).
